calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar May-01-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-04-2024 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated February 6, 1984 is admitted to probate. Danielle F. Elu is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 1, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Maloney. Not reported.
